name: Kwang Ming Silk Mill Co., Ltd.
summary: Kwang Ming Silk Mill Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of polyester processing yarn. The company offers composite fabrics, special functionality fabrics, synthetic fiber fabrics, and general garments materials, as well as man-made fiber products. It is also involved in real estate leasing and trading business. The company's products are used for fashion clothing, environmental protection functional fabrics, outdoor leisure fabrics, and home decoration, as well as cloth for shoe materials. The company is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
